subject: Mesh health status report v5 — turn 3 re-delivery, fresh snapshot

body.summary: Turn 3 was already marked completed in state.db (2026-03-30T13:22:13Z) and addressed in turns 5, 6, and 7. This response provides a fresh v5 snapshot as of 2026-03-31T14:16:44Z.

trace_stats.pattern: All entries show activation=0, would_fire=false. Oscillator remains quiescent. No fire events in current trace window.

glymphatic_maintenance.pattern: Steady-state rotation at 120-line chunks every ~120 cycles. Glymphatic system functioning nominally.

neuroglial.microglial_actions: None observed in recent trace window.

autonomy_budget.note: Cutoff=0 means unlimited. Spent increased from 14 (v4) to 16.

orientation_payload_builder.note: This deliberation triggered via external hook delivery. The orientation payload builder produces the context that enables meshd to generate these status reports. Turn 3 originally requested this validation — confirmed operational across 4 successive responses.

anomalies: Turn 3 re-delivered despite already having status=completed in state.db since 2026-03-30T13:22:13Z. Likely caused by external trigger rather than transport watcher. No corrective action needed — idempotent handling applied.
